title: Eigenvalues, Decompositions, and Dimension Reduction
description: Build, test, and communicate a model involving high-dimensional sensor data. Learners cumulatively produce a reproducible spectral methods computational study through theory, guided work, debugging, transfer, retrieval, and assessment.
objectives: Formulate eigen systems in a dimensioned applied model and defend the method's assumptions.
Derive diagonalization in a dimensioned applied model and defend the method's assumptions.
Compute orthogonality qr in a dimensioned applied model and defend the method's assumptions.
